productDisplayName: Enroute Men Leather Black Formal Shoes
description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of high ankle boots from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this boot makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. Upper Full grain leather upper with supple leather inner lining for breathable comfort Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Padded footbed for all-day comfort High ankle collar for better support to the lower leg and for style Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole Durable rubber outsole with a raised and textured heel for grip and ergonomic comfort shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
